paddingRefactor.description: Successfully refactored padding structure to match DynamicContentCarousel/TestimonialsCarousel pattern
changes: Updated container padding to py-18 md:py-23 (applied unconditionally, not just dark mode)
Changed pseudo inset: before:-inset-y-8 → before:inset-y-0 (only in dark mode)
TSX and PHP kept in perfect sync

accessibilityImprovements.description: Added complete WAI-ARIA carousel pattern support matching DynamicContentCarousel implementation
changes: Added aria-label fallback on section when heading is empty (PHP + TSX)
Added autoplay toggle button with Pause.svg icon when autoplayCarousel enabled (PHP)
Extended controls row condition to include $autoplayCarousel (PHP)
Implemented slide ARIA attributes via JavaScript: role='group', aria-roledescription='slide', aria-label='Slide X of Y' (JS)
Added updateSlideAriaAttributes function to handle loop mode duplicate slides (JS)
Implemented autoplay toggle handler with pause/play icon swap (JS)
Added aria-live management: 'off' when playing, 'polite' when paused (JS)
Added prefers-reduced-motion support to disable autoplay (JS)
Added focusin/focusout handlers to pause autoplay on focus (JS)
Copied Pause.svg and Play.svg from DynamicContentCarousel/resources/

testPageRebuild.description: Successfully rebuilt test page (ID 98) with 14 variations using DemoContainer wrappers
variations: Default - Dark Mode (3 Columns, Full Content)
newVariations: Loop Mode (variation 13) - Tests infinite loop with ARIA slide attributes
Loop + Autoplay (variation 14) - Tests combined loop and autoplay with rotation control

nextSteps: QA Agent should verify padding equivalence in both light and dark modes
QA Agent should test WAI-ARIA carousel pattern compliance
QA Agent should verify autoplay toggle button functionality
QA Agent should test prefers-reduced-motion support
QA Agent should verify focus-based autoplay pause behavior
QA Agent should test loop mode with ARIA attributes
